issues.description: Condition must specify that Uta is rested. Current condition only checks if Uta exists on board, not its resting state. Should use HasCardOnBoard with additional rested state requirement or a more specific condition.
Trigger should be 'Trigger' (aura/static ability) not 'OnPlay'. This is a passive bonus that applies while Uta is rested on board, not an effect that triggers when this card is played.
